buildings.note: South tower at 81 Bay Street. North tower is 243.1 m / 50 floors.
Tallest residential tower in mixed-use complex. Development includes 46-, 39-, and 22-storey towers.
South Tower (primary). UrbanToronto forum lists 167.94m / 45s. Current spec lists 161m—spec is ~7m LOW.
Dual towers: East (41 floors) and West (32 floors). Spec lists 44 floors (single tower)—FLOOR COUNT MISMATCH. Height in meters not found in 10-search budget.
buildings.src: SkyscraperPage forum, multiple sources confirm dual 41 & 32

buildings.note: Front Street facade: 752 feet = 229.23 m. Three connecting box masses between Bay & York streets, south side of block.
Full galleria/arcade length between Dundas and Queen Streets is 400 m (1,300 ft). Spec lists ~260 m—spec is ~140 m LOW, off by ~54%.
buildings.src: Web search results for Toronto Eaton Centre
